subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou hearest the wailing of Thy servants in their separation from Thee, and the cry of Thy handmaidens in Thy days. Thou hast kindled in their hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تسمع ضجیج عبادک فی فراقک و صریخ امائک فی ایامک اوقدت فی قلوبهم
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @love of God
